stemHtml: What is a possible cause for the auto-recovery of an aeroplane after the stall?

options.a: The angle of incidence of the wing is smaller than the angle of incidence of the horizontal stabiliser.
options.b: The angle of attack of the stabiliser is bigger than the angle of attack of the wing.
options.c: The wing surface is bigger than the surface of the horizontal stabiliser.
options.d: The angle of incidence of the wing is larger than the angle of incidence of the horizontal stabiliser.
